title: Supa Smooth
description: A Modpack that's smooth and lagless with shaders and is clean but still vanilla
body:
Supa Smooth – A Lag-Free Minecraft Experience
Version: 1.21.5 (Fabric)
Performance. Polish. Perfection.

Step into the world of Supa Smooth, a carefully curated modpack designed to give you the cleanest, lag-free, and aesthetically refined Minecraft experience possible—all without sacrificing your vanilla charm. Perfect for low to mid-end PCs or creators who want a silky-smooth ride.

🔧 Key Features:
Performance Boosters

⚡ Sodium, Lithium, FerriteCore, EntityCulling, MoreCulling, CullLeaves – drastically improve FPS and reduce memory usage.

🧠 Iris Shaders – fully compatible with Sodium for beautiful visuals.

Visual Enhancements

🌀 Animated Loading Screen and SmoothGUI – small tweaks for a sleeker UI/UX.

🌙 LambDynamicLights – lighting that follows you naturally.

Quality of Life Tweaks

🖱️ Mouse Tweaks and ModMenu – better controls and interfaces.

🔍 WI-Zoom – smooth zooming to explore in detail.

🧩 PlaceholderAPI, ForgeConfigAPIPort, PuzzlesLib – backend helpers to keep everything running smoothly.

Whether you're building, exploring, or just chilling out in your Minecraft world, Supa Smooth ensures that every frame is fluid and every moment is crisp.

✅ Low-lag
✅ Lightweight
✅ Stunning shaders optional
✅ Perfect for builders, survivalists, and casual players
